items.html: *And now we shall explain all this, with God's help. At first, this Tzelem of Gadlut [adulthood] comes to him from the Bina of Israel Saba and Tevuna, from the discernment of their externality, which is in the posterior [Achoraim] — both in vessels and in Lights. They enter ZA [Zeir Anpin], and the innermost Kli [vessel] of them all is made in him, in the discernment of the back alone, which is his externality, and within it the Mochin, which are a Neshama [soul] to him — and all this in the discernment of the back. Then ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva] stand Achor be Achor [back to back], and then the female is grown at the back of ZA.
